sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91" key="a)/bios2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄβιος</orth>, (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype> intensive) <sense id="n91.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wealthy,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
